Razor gang.description: Razor gangs were criminal gangs that dominated the Sydney crime scene in the 1920s, known for using razors as weapons after handguns were criminalized in New South Wales. They were involved in drug distribution, prostitution, and other organized crime activities. Key figures included Tilly Devine and Kate Leigh. The gangs declined after the 1920s.

'Ndrina Nasone.description: A 'ndrina (local clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Scilla, Province of Reggio Calabria, Italy. Active since at least the 1970s, it has been involved in mafia association, extortion, and fraudulent asset registration. Several operations in the 2010s and 2020s led to arrests of its members, though some were later acquitted.

edges.evidence_quote: The initial aim of the Karen National Union (KNU) and its armed wing the Karen National Liberation Army (KNLA) was to create independent state for the Karen people.

edges.evidence_quote: It signed the Nationwide Ceasefire Agreement in 2015 and has had minor skirmishes with the Karen National Liberation Army (KNLA).

descriptions: Rasta City agreed to a peace deal with Sixx in November 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: In November 2023 it was reported in the news that Rasta City had agreed to a peace deal with Sixx.

D.C. Blacks.description: African-American prison gang composed of inmates from Washington D.C., operating within the U.S. federal prison system. Formed due to the concentration of D.C. inmates in federal facilities, it is allied with the Black Guerrilla Family and rivals the Aryan Brotherhood. The gang is one of the largest prison gangs but smaller than street gangs like the Bloods and Crips.

descriptions: D.C. Blacks is a rival gang of Aryan Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: Other rival gangs include the Black P. Stones, Bloods, Crips, D.C. Blacks, and Nuestra Familia.

Gang de la Brise de Mer.description: Corsican criminal organization founded in the 1970s, based in Northern Corsica. Engages in racketeering, drug trafficking, gambling, money laundering, and other illegal activities across France, Italy, Africa, and Latin America. Known for violent robberies and conflicts with rival gangs. Estimated capital of 120-150 million euros.

edges.target: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: Gang de la Brise de Mer is a component of the Corsican mafia managing modern criminal activity.
edges.evidence_quote: modern (1990s–present) criminal activity is managed by the Marseille-based Unione Corse and Northern Corsica–based Gang de la Brise de Mer

edges.target: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: Brise de Mer was the main organization within the Corsican mafia from the 1980s to the 2000s.
edges.evidence_quote: Dagli anni '80 agli anni 2000 la principale organizzazione era quella che andava sotto il nome di " Brezza del Mare " ( Brise de Mer ).

Dirty Dozen Motorcycle Club.description: Outlaw motorcycle club based in Arizona, founded in 1964 by twelve founding members. It became the largest and most violent motorcycle gang in the state, involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, prostitution, assault, and murder. The club merged with the Hells Angels in 1997.

descriptions: Dirty Dozen conflicted with Bad Company MC in 1980.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dirty Dozen came into conflict the following year with the Bad Company MC

descriptions: Dirty Dozen allied with Hells Angels for methamphetamine supply.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dirty Dozen, in turn, formed an alliance with the Hells Angels, who became the club's main supplier of methamphetamine.

descriptions: Dirty Dozen allied with Hells Angels against Mongols and Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dirty Dozen, in turn, formed an alliance with the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Dirty Dozen merged with Hells Angels in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: the Dirty Dozen came to the attention of Sonny Barger... the majority of the Dirty Dozen's membership voted to 'patch over' to join the Hells Angels.

Hutch Organised Crime Gang.description: Irish criminal organization founded by Gerry Hutch in the 1980s, based in Dublin. Involved in drug trafficking, armed robberies, murder, and money laundering. Operates in Ireland, Spain, and the United Kingdom. Engaged in a violent feud with the Kinahan Organised Crime Group.

Kinahan Organised Crime Group.description: Major Irish transnational organised crime syndicate founded by Christy Kinahan in the 1990s. Based in Ireland with operations in the UK, Spain, and UAE. Engaged in drug trafficking, money laundering, murder, and arms trafficking. Estimated wealth up to €1 billion. Involved in a feud with the Hutch Gang since 2015.

descriptions: Hells Angels Nomads chapter engaged in a turf war with Satans Slaves.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nomads chapter became involved in a turf war with the Southampton chapter of the Satans Slaves, which began after Hells Angels members Stephen Harris and Barry Burn were fired upon during a trip to Bristol.

descriptions: Lone Legion is a member of the A-Team alliance with Satan's Slaves MC.
edges.evidence_quote: According to media and Police the club is a member of the "A-Team", an alliance between several NZ biker groups including the Outcasts MC, the Epitaph Riders MC, the Forty-Fives MC, the Southern Vikings MC, Satan's Slaves MC, Sinn Fein MC and the Lost Breed MC .

descriptions: Malyshev mafia was involved in money laundering in Spain.
edges.evidence_quote: The Tambov and Malyshev Russian mafia organisations were involved.

'Ndrina Mannolo.description: The Mannolo are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta from Cutro and San Leonardo di Cutro, Calabria. They are involved in drug trafficking, political influence, and weapons offenses. They are allied with the Trapasso-Zoffreo, Pane-Iazzolino, and Grande Aracri clans. The group has been targeted in multiple police operations from the 1990s to the 2020s.

descriptions: Mannolo is associated with Arena in a police operation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione 'Golgota' contro gli Arena, i Nicoscia e Mannolo

descriptions: Dragone is allied with Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata con i Mannolo di San Leonardo di Cutro

descriptions: Mannolo is listed as an allied 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Mannolo ( San Leonardo di Cutro )

descriptions: Mannolo and Arena were targeted together in operation Golgota, suggesting they are part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: 10 febbraio 2021: operazione Golgota contro gli Arena , i Nicoscia e Mannolo .

descriptions: Mannolo and Falcone were targeted together in operation Big Bang, suggesting they are part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: 29 marzo 2021: operazione Big Bang contro le cosche Mannolo, Scerbo, Zoffreo e Falcone .

descriptions: Mannolo is allied with Grande Aracri.

descriptions: Members of Mannolo and Scumaci were arrested together, indicating joint operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 2 agosto 2001, con l'operazione Polifemo dei Carabinieri di Sellia Marina vengono arrestati componenti della cosca Mannolo e Scumaci che operavano nelle zone di Sellia Marina e San Leonardo di Cutro .

descriptions: Mannolo is allied with Trapasso-Zoffreo.

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Mannolo.

descriptions: Trapasso is allied with Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: I Trapasso sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro e Steccato di Cutro , alleata dei Mannolo e dei Grande Aracri di Cutro .

descriptions: Giglio is allied with Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , dei Farao-Marincola di Cirò e dei Levato.

Albanian Boys.description: The Albanian Boys were a gang of Albanians operating in central Bronx, founded in 1991. They evolved from a youth ethnic street gang to subcontractors for local organized crime, engaging in extortion, intimidation, protection money, and debt collection. The gang was active in the 1990s and had about 100 members.

descriptions: Albanian Boys and MS-13 are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: MS-13

descriptions: Albanian Boys and Rudaj Organization are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rudaj Organization

descriptions: Albanian Boys is considered part of the Albanian mafia in the US.
edges.evidence_quote: the term "Albanian Mafia" may include or refer specifically to various Albanian-American organized crime groups, such as the Rudaj Organization and the Albanian Boys

descriptions: The Albanian Boys are listed as rivals of the Tanglewood Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Various gangs in Westchester County and New York City, including the Albanian Boys

descriptions: MOD and ORB both splintered from Peace MOD, and later had a confrontation in 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: the breakup of "Peace MOD" caused it to break into three gangs, including the "Masters of Destruction", the "Mongolian Boys Society" (MBS) and the "Oriental Ruthless Boys" (ORB).

descriptions: The Muntasir Billah Brigade has ties to the Grey Wolves.
edges.evidence_quote: Some Syrian rebel groups have ties to the Grey Wolves. One is the Muntasir Billah Brigade, another is the Turkmen Abdulhamid Han Brigade.

descriptions: Gambino boss Carlo Gambino formed an alliance with the Di Maggio clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Carlo Gambino created an alliance between the Gambino family and three Sicilian clans: the Inzerillos, the Spatolas and the Di Maggios.

Gang of Amazons.description: A family of serial killers from Stavropol, Russia, who committed murders and robberies from 2007 to 2013. Founded by Inessa Tarverdiyeva and Roman Podkopaev, the group included their daughters and other relatives. They targeted victims in the North Caucasian Federal District, using camping trips as cover. The gang was apprehended in 2013.
